summary: Completed comprehensive testing of House of Veritas authentication, notification, and dashboard features. All core features working correctly.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - some dashboard stats may be hardcoded

issues: Console shows 404 for /_vercel/insights/script.js - Vercel analytics not configured (expected in non-Vercel environment)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All auth features tested and working. Password reset uses in-memory store - passwords reset during testing will persist until server restart. SMS/Email sending is MOCKED - returns demoPassword in response.

login.single_form_email_password: PASS - Login form with email/password fields working
login.correct_credentials_redirect: PASS - Hans redirects to /dashboard/hans, others to their respective dashboards
login.demo_credentials_shown: PASS - Demo credentials displayed on login page

password_reset.shows_demo_password: PASS - Shows demoPassword in response (SMS/Email MOCKED)

logout.clears_session: PASS - Clears localStorage and redirects to /login
logout.header_logout_button: PASS - Logout button in header works

notifications.bell_shows_count: PASS - Shows unread notification count (4 for Hans)
notifications.panel_opens: PASS - Notification panel opens on bell click
notifications.mark_all_read: PASS - Mark all as read button works

dashboards.hans_blue_tech_theme: PASS - Blue gradient with circuit/tech SVG patterns
dashboards.charl_amber_workshop_theme: PASS - Amber gradient with gear/wrench SVG patterns
dashboards.lucky_green_garden_theme: PASS - Green gradient with leaf/flower SVG patterns
dashboards.irma_purple_home_theme: PASS - Purple gradient with heart/house SVG patterns

route_protection.hans_admin_privilege: PASS - Hans can view other dashboards
route_protection.non_admin_restricted: PASS - Non-admin users redirected to own dashboard when accessing others

mocked_apis.sms_twilio: MOCKED - Returns demoPassword in response when Twilio not configured
mocked_apis.notifications: Seeded with demo data in notification-context.tsx
